message.content:
@startuml
participant "HostApp" as HostApp
participant "NanoRep" as NanoRep
participant "NSURLConnection" as NSURLConnection
participant "NSUserDefaults" as UserDefaults

== Initialization ==
activate HostApp
HostApp ->> NanoRep : (any request)
deactivate HostApp

group alt [Check if the session id is stored] #LightGray
    
    group Send request for session id
        
        activate NanoRep
        note right of NanoRep: fetch the session id
        NanoRep ->> UserDefaults : 
        deactivate NanoRep
        
        ...session id from server...
        
        activate NanoRep
        note right of NanoRep: store session id
        NanoRep ->> UserDefaults : 
        deactivate NanoRep
        
        activate NanoRep
        note right of NanoRep: keep alive request
        NanoRep ->> NSURLConnection : 
        
        ...keep alive response...
        deactivate NanoRep
        
    end
    
end


activate NanoRep
note left of NanoRef: any other requests to be sent here..
Note over NanoRep,NSURlconnection:(any request)\n\nresponse for the \n(any request)
nanoRep->>nsurlconnection: 

....response for the (any request)...



@enduml
